authors: Constanza Gajardo David Domingo Irene Costera Meijer a Department of Communication Sciences
Chilec Department of Information and Communication Sciences
Belgiumd Department of Language and Communication
raw_title: Examining Platforms’ Affordances: Bridging Journalists’ and Users’ Practices of Online Engagement
title_en: Examining Platforms’ Affordances: Bridging Journalists’ and Users’ Practices of Online Engagement
title_zh: 审视平台可供性：连接记者与用户的在线参与实践
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了数字平台如何影响记者和用户的在线互动方式。它关注平台提供的功能如何连接新闻生产和公众参与，帮助理解现代新闻业中的协作模式。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how digital platforms shape the ways journalists and users interact online. It focuses on how platform features connect news production with public engagement, helping understand collaborative patterns in modern journalism.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字媒体环境中平台技术如何中介新闻实践与公众参与，探索新闻业与用户互动的动态关系。
research_direction_en: Investigating how platform technologies mediate journalistic practices and public engagement in digital media environments, exploring the dynamic relationship between journalism and user interaction.
